message:
Add GH_TOKEN env var to Build step for private repo access

The nix/update-plugins.sh script needs to fetch the tenzir-plugins
tarball from GitHub. The GITHUB_TOKEN only has access to the current
repository, but TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN has access to private repos
like tenzir-plugins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -126,6 +126,7 @@ jobs:
         id: build
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: |
           release_flag=""
           if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "release" ]]; then
